creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 243764
git format-patch

Hi,

According to discussion with Michael Osipov (michaelo@apache.org), maintainer of devel/maven* and Maven committer, I would like to submit new port devel/maven39 with Maven 3.9.x (actual version is 3.9.3). 

This Maven version allows to update java/eclipse to latest version.

Attached git-patch, checked by portlint/portclippy. At least works for me, not tested by poudriere (temporary lack of access to power).

Thanks, 
 @mizhka
